title: Budget Implementation Act, 2005
summary: Implements federal budget measures including transfers, taxation amendments, and targeted spending programs.
fullText: An Act to implement certain provisions of the budget tabled in Parliament, including fiscal transfers, tax amendments, and accountability measures for public spending.

title: Safe Streets and Communities Act
summary: Reforms criminal justice provisions, including sentencing rules and victim-focused protections.
fullText: An Act to enact and amend criminal justice legislation in support of public safety, clearer sentencing, and stronger safeguards for victims of crime.

title: Impact Assessment Act (Bill C-69)
summary: Introduces a new federal impact assessment framework for major projects, including environmental and social criteria.
fullText: An Act to enact the Impact Assessment Act and related amendments, establishing a modernized federal review process for designated projects and regulatory oversight.

title: Fiscal Responsibility and Energy Security Act
summary: Proposes spending restraint rules, targeted tax relief, and accelerated approvals for strategic Canadian energy projects.
fullText: An Act to establish federal deficit guardrails, provide broad-based tax relief for working families, and streamline approvals for nationally significant energy and infrastructure projects.
